Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' that occur before 'Completed + In Call' in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Number of cases where 'Unmatched + Unmatched' appears and eventually leads to 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Number of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Ratio of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' occurrences to 'Completed + In Call' occurrences across the log
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' activities that are not followed by any other activity (i.e., terminal events)
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' as the first activity in a case variant
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' relative to the total occurrences of 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Number of distinct process variants containing 'Unmatched + Unmatched'
Percentage of cases containing 'Unmatched + Unmatched' that do not reach 'Completed + Resolved' or 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases where 'Completed + Resolved' does not happen

Name: Frequency of direct transitions from 'Unmatched + Unmatched' to 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' occurring in cases that also contain 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average number of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' occurrences per case
Metric: the average of the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Unmatched + Unmatched'

Name: Ratio of cases starting with 'Unmatched + Unmatched' versus those starting with 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' executed by resources associated with high-impact incidents (impact = 'High')
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases

Name: Number of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' events that occur after 'Completed + In Call' in the same case
Metric: Number of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Fraction of all 'Unmatched + Unmatched' events that appear in variants with performance duration below the median
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' that are isolated (i.e., no repeated occurrence in the same case)
Metric: Percentage of 'Unmatched + Unmatched' out of all cases
